subject: Handoff: fb_links_tangomango_*.json - FB URLs for enrichment
body:
BOOKER,

New handoff format for TangoMango events with FB links.

## Input File

`fb-conditioner/data/incoming/fb_links_tangomango_YYYYMMDD.json`

```json
{
  "source": "tangomango.org",
  "generated": "2026-04-01T...",
  "processed": false,
  "events": [
    {
      "tm_event_id": "29041",
      "fb_urls": [
        "https://www.facebook.com/events/1086533543439900/",
        "https://www.facebook.com/events/2398927833818336/"
      ],
      "source_event": {
        "title": "La Vista Wed. Practica",
        "venue": "Portuguese Hall",
        "city": "Mountain View",
        "date": "2026-04-01"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

## What I Need Back

For each event, pick the best FB URL match and enrich via CDP:
- Venue name + full address + lat/lng
- Organizer name + FB page
- Event description, times
- FB event ID (for dedup)

## Output File

`fb-conditioner/data/incoming/fb_enriched_tangomango_YYYYMMDD.json`

```json
{
  "source": "tangomango.org",
  "processed": true,
  "processedAt": "...",
  "events": [
    {
      "tm_event_id": "29041",
      "fb_event_id": "1086533543439900",
      "status": "enriched",
      "event": { /* full FB event data */ },
      "venue": {
        "name": "Portuguese Hall",
        "address": "361 Villa St",
        "city": "Mountain View",
        "state": "CA",
        "lat": 37.123,
        "lng": -122.456
      },
      "organizer": { /* if available */ }
    }
  ]
}
```

## Process

1. Read `fb_links_tangomango_*.json`
2. For each event with multiple fb_urls, pick best match (title/date similarity)
3. Enrich via CDP (your Stage 2 process)
4. Write `fb_enriched_tangomango_*.json`
5. Set `processed: true` on input file

I'm running a batch now - should have 50+ events with FB URLs shortly.

— Harvey
